name: Bonus Package
description: Legendary Torgue grenade mod from Borderlands 2. This is a MIRV that splits into several bomblets, and each bomblet then produces an extra follow-up blast of its own. The chained submunitions blanket a wide area with explosions, making it excellent for clearing groups. In tight spaces, enemies can be struck multiple times, resulting in very high damage.
notes: Works with any delivery type. Drops from Boom or Bewm, so you can sometimes see two in a single run and it is relatively easy to farm. It has a Seraph variant, Meteor Shower, which generally throws more submunitions for higher total damage in a smaller area. A little fuse time is advised to reduce self-damage. Homing, sticky homing, or rubberised versions can be risky at close range.

special.description: Each sub-grenade creates one extra sub-grenade when it detonates, increasing overall damage and coverage.
special.title: 2x more awesome, bonus extreme!
